articles.title: 🚨 Official: all squads already unveiled for the 2026 World Cup
articles.description: Who’s getting on the train? Who’s staying on the platform? This carousel lists all the national teams that have revealed their squad for the 2026 World Cup. This Friday, Ivory Coast, Belgium, and Japan officially announced their World Cup squads. After being at odds with the Ivorian federation since his exclusion from the 2025 AFCON, Nicolas Pépé has indeed been called up by head coach Emerse Faé. Elye Wahi, who recently obtained an Ivorian passport, will also be making the trip. Martial Godo and Sébastien Haller are on standby. IVORY COAST BELGIUM JAPAN FRANCE SWEDEN BOSNIA NEW ZEALAND This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇫🇷 here.
